description: S3 bucket has public-read ACL — all objects publicly accessible. UK GDPR Article 32 breach risk.
remediation_steps: 1. Remove public-read ACL. 2. Enable public access block. 3. Add bucket policy restricting to app-sg only. 4. Verify no public objects exist.

description: Hardcoded DB_PASSWORD=Nimbus2024! in services/auth-service/.env committed to git history.
remediation_steps: 1. Create AWS Secrets Manager secret. 2. Update auth-service to fetch secret at startup. 3. Remove .env from git history (git filter-branch or BFG). 4. Rotate the password after Secrets Manager is configured.

description: IAM role policy grants Action:* on Resource:* — full AWS account access from any service using this role.
remediation_steps: 1. Create least-privilege policy with only required actions. 2. Test with new policy before removing wildcard. 3. Apply new policy. 4. Remove wildcard policy attachment.

description: No IAM role boundary set — lateral movement risk if service is compromised.
remediation_steps: Add permissions boundary to nimbuscloud-platform-role limiting maximum permissions.

description: No CloudTrail configured — no audit log of AWS API calls. Cannot detect credential misuse.
remediation_steps: Enable CloudTrail in eu-west-2 with S3 delivery and CloudWatch Logs integration.

description: No lifecycle policy — objects never expire. Storage costs growing and stale data retained.
remediation_steps: Add lifecycle rule to expire objects older than 90 days.
